title: Pack of 100 White Plastic Bowls, Reusable and Washable Tableware, 12 oz Soup Bowls, Biodegradable & Compostable Bowls, Dessert Bowls, for BBQs Party Picnics Catering (100PCS)
features: 【High quality and durability】: Made of new heavy reusable food grade plastic, BPA free, non-toxic and harmless, family rest assured to use, smooth burr free, comfortable to touch, heavy plastic structure, can prevent breaking, bending and breaking, enhance durability.

【Easy to use】: Our multi-functional reusable soup bowl is easy to clean, after use, you can dispose of these bowls, not for washing dishes after meals, left stains and trouble, easy to get done, and can be cleaned repeatedly, saving resources, superposition storage, no space, convenient for next use.

【Versatile】: Our reusable soup bowls are 350ml in size, 15cms in diameter and 4.45cms in height, making them perfect for sandwich bowls, salad bowls, ice cream bowls, snack bowls, etc., no matter what type of food - hot, cold, dry, wet, sticky, sweet or spicy.

【Multi-scene application】: The white appearance, simple and elegant, adds a modern flavor to any scene, is very suitable for daily use, stacked storage features, easy to carry, whether at home, cafes, restaurants, self-service areas, parties, courtyards, picnics, or in the park, camping, school, or even wilderness trips.
description: Product Information: Product name: 12Oz. White plastic bowl Size: Diameter: 15㎝, height: 4.45㎝ Material: 100% food grade plastic Features: 1.
